headline: TXU Energy's Beat the Heat Program Returns to Help Texas Families Stay Cool and Safe This Summer
summary: As summer temperatures rise across Texas, TXU Energy is once again partnering with nonprofit organizations across the state to help Texans stay safe, cool, and connected to critical resources during the hottest months of the year.
